title: Earthy Crunchy Filipino Vegetable Lasagna
description: A weeknight Filipino dish featuring lasagna sheets, earthy vegetables, and crunchy texture, perfect for a sugar-free friendly meal. This recipe combines the flavors of the Philippines with the comfort of Italian lasagna.
instructions: Sauté sliced eggplant and zucchini in a little oil until tender, set aside.
In a separate pan, sauté sliced mushrooms until they release their liquid and start to brown, set aside.
Combine tomato sauce, ricotta cheese, and chopped parsley in a bowl, mix well.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a thin layer of tomato sauce on the bottom.
Arrange 4 lasagna sheets on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta mixture over the lasagna sheets, followed by half of the sautéed eggplant, zucchini, and mushrooms.
Sprinkle with half of the mozzarella cheese and half of the fried shallots.

Repeat the layers, starting with the lasagna sheets, then the remaining ricotta mixture, the remaining eggplant, zucchini, and mushrooms, and finally the remaining mozzarella cheese and fried shallots.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
